channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-08
item.description:
Summary: Deep technological focus on agent financial governance and identity standards is contrasted by significant community pessimism regarding token performance. Development is shifting toward secure autonomous agent-to-agent commerce through frameworks like Dreamline x402 and the MAXIA marketplace.

GitHub Activity:

  • Fix/toon action params (open)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace (open)
  • feat: add plugin-mnemopay — economic memory for AI agents (open)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Dominated by ELISA token price performance concerns (95% drop) and market comparisons, alongside successful one-click agent deployments on Hatcher.host....
  • #coders: Technical troubleshooting regarding Twitter/X login failures and version compatibility for plugin-twitter....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-07
item.description: Summary: Error: Failed to generate briefing due to LLM or parsing issues.

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-01
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is facing a critical trust crisis due to a 99.5% token price decline and allegations of team dumping, contrasted by a high-velocity technical phase focused on 'Agent Commerce' and security patching. A major supply chain vulnerability in the Axios package was identified and mitigated across several plugins.

GitHub Activity:

  • major database refactor (open)
  • Parallel Action Execution (merged)
  • proposal for OWS wallet plugin (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Severe community distress regarding token price collapse and perceived lack of leadership communication. Allegations of team dumping and focus shifting to Milady AI....
  • #coders: Critical alert regarding Axios supply chain attack and discussions on Instagram scraping tools and Orbis API updates....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-31
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is advancing autonomous agent commerce through the x402 payment protocol and integrated marketplaces while addressing a critical security gap in agent spend governance. The community is focused on professional networking and ecosystem fragmentation as the project prepares for broader adoption.

GitHub Activity:

  • [Plugin Proposal] Dreamline x402 Policy Facilitator for autonomous agent spend governance (open)
  • fix: extract action params from standalone XML blocks in comma-separated format (merged)
  • Race condition: `await runtime.evaluate()` in message service silently discards incoming messages (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Discussions centered on token economics and trust, with moderators clarifying supply mechanics following a significant market cap drop. Community members also debated the merits of crypto-based SaaS p...
  • #coders: High volume of professional networking with developers sharing extensive tech stacks in AI (LangChain, CrewAI) and full-stack development (Next.js, FastAPI, Docker) seeking contract work....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-30
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is prioritizing autonomous agent commerce through new integrations with TaskBounty and the Orbis API marketplace, while simultaneously addressing community fragmentation and technical governance for x402 payments.

GitHub Activity:

  • fix: extract action params from standalone XML blocks in comma-separated format (merged)
  • [Plugin Proposal] Dreamline x402 Policy Facilitator for autonomous agent spend governance (open)
  • feat: proposal for OWS wallet plugin (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on information architecture; users suggested a centralized project hub to clarify that projects like Milady are built on ElizaOS. New user onboarding for the agent-challenge was a secondary them...
  • #coders: Announcement of Orbis, an API marketplace for autonomous agent consumption. Significant community effort spent on identifying and flagging scams impersonating core contributors....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-29
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is shifting toward an autonomous agent economy with the launch of TaskBounty's crypto-integrated task management and the introduction of the Orbis API tool for browserless agent subscriptions. Simultaneously, the framework is preparing for a major beta release emphasizing on-chain identity via the SAID Protocol and expanded communication integrations.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor for long-term architecture (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • xProof plugin submission to registry (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on TaskBounty integration for autonomous agents and the status of projects like RUBY and Hyperscape in hackathons....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into the Orbis API tool for browserless API subscriptions and trading flow plugins for agent repositories....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-28
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focusing on transitioning from a framework to a SaaS deployment platform (elizacloud) while integrating advanced autonomous trading and on-chain provenance features. High-velocity community development is centered on plugin registry submissions and clarifying the project's complex organizational boundaries.

GitHub Activity:

  • xProof plugin in ElizaOS plugin registry (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the elizacloud business model, the identity of ecosystem tokens, and resolving community confusion regarding Hyperscape's status as an incubated project....
  • #coders: Professional networking and introductions; 'trace' shared deep expertise in RAG, LLM orchestration, and multi-step agent workflows seeking startup opportunities....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-27
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning from an open-source framework into a commercial SaaS ecosystem with the introduction of elizacloud, Jeju blockchain, and the xProof decision provenance plugin. Significant infrastructure consolidation is underway to streamline the DegenAI hosting environment into a single Spartan instance.

GitHub Activity:

  • xProof plugin in ElizaOS plugin registry (open)
  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Clarifications on the framework vs. SaaS business model (elizacloud). Detailed discussions on token utility for Jeju and DegenAI's role as a platform host....
  • #coders: Promotion of hatcher.host for ElizaOS/Milady hosting and technical deep-dive into xProof.app for MultiversX integration....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-26
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is shifting toward autonomous trading agent development and decentralized identity integrations, punctuated by the launch of the Nosana Builders' Challenge and the release of the Pythia MCP server for on-chain market data.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integrate SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Heavy focus on autonomous trading infrastructure. Discussion of the Pythia MCP server for oracle data and the 'Undesirables' 4,444 agent NFT workspaces....
  • #discussion: Community management including onboarding new members and addressing concerns regarding token price volatility and the Milady app status....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-25
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is addressing a critical supply chain security vulnerability while simultaneously expanding its ecosystem through partnerships with Nosana and the release of on-chain market data tools. The community remains focused on the upcoming Milady app launch and navigating significant token price volatility.

GitHub Activity:

  • Initiated a major database refactor (open)
  • Integrated the SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Discussions focused on the Pythia MCP server release for on-chain data and the critical litellm supply chain security alert. A collaboration inquiry from Coin Post was clarified to prevent unauthorize...
  • #discussion: Announcement of the Nosana partnership and Builders' Challenge workshops. Significant community discussion regarding Eliza token price volatility and 'rug' patterns....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-24
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is currently focused on the final development stages of the Milady app and expanding autonomous agent monetization capabilities on the Base blockchain. However, the project is facing significant community friction due to token price volatility and perceived communication gaps regarding token utility.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol Integration (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on token price decline ($2.5 to $0.0009) and the timeline for the Milady app. Team members emphasized holding and following official updates....
  • #general: Technical architecture clarifications regarding the relationship between ElizaOS, Milady, and OpenClaw to resolve community misunderstandings....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-23
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is expanding through the launch of an autonomous agent monetization plugin on Base and the integration of Babylon for token buybacks, despite ongoing community frustration regarding token utility and communication transparency.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integrate SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the launch of the autonomous agent monetization plugin and clarifications regarding the lack of a traditional whitepaper. Significant debate occurred regarding token performance and the Babyl...
  • #coders: Minimal technical activity; primarily used for an off-topic marketing manager recruitment post for a meme coin project....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-22
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is navigating a period of high community tension regarding token utility and migration transparency, despite the beta release of the Milady app and successful infrastructure integrations with Babylon and decentralized identity protocols.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve architecture (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Intense debate regarding token price performance (-84% for many), lack of utility, and perceived poor communication from leadership....
  • #coders: Clarification of ecosystem hierarchy: ElizaOS is the base OS; Milady is built on top of it; OpenClaw agents are compatible within Milady....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-21
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is transitioning into a high-velocity phase with the launch of the Babylon market simulation and imminent Milady app release, despite significant community friction regarding token performance and leadership communication. Technical focus has shifted toward decentralized identity via the SAID protocol and resolving ElizaCloud infrastructure deployment issues.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on Babylon integration benefits (airdrops and buybacks) and heated debate regarding Eliza token price drops and perceived leadership absence....
  • #coders: Troubleshooting ElizaCloud disk image upload failures and GPG key issues in the Milady repository....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-20
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is facing a severe liquidity and confidence crisis as the token reached new all-time lows, while technical development continues with new plugin releases and cloud infrastructure testing. Tensions are high regarding leadership absence and the perceived failure of the Milady-to-ElizaOS migration.

GitHub Activity:

  • Integrated the SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Community distress over token price performance, delistings, and perceived leadership absence, with Odilitime serving as the primary team liaison....
  • #coders: Focus on the release of the Moltraffle raffle plugin and Troubleshooting Eliza Cloud deployment errors related to missing Discord modules....
